title: Wales Probation Service action plan and response letters
body: "HMPPS action plans and response letters published following the HMIP inspection of Wales Probation Service.  This includes:  An inspection of probation services in Cardiff and the Vale PDU - published December 2025.  An inspection of probation services in Gwent PDU - published December 2025.  An inspection of probation services in North Wales PDU - published November 2025.  An inspection of probation services in Dyfed Powys PDU - published October 2025.  An inspection of probation services in Cwm Taf Morgannwg PDU - published October 2025.  An inspection of probation services in Swansea Neath Port Talbot - published October 2025. "
